qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Code injection via unescaped OpenAPI pattern field in mock generation
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable component and source field: this finding targets packages/mock/src/faker/getters/scalar.ts interpolation of schema pattern into mock code, while the advisory targets @orval/mcp server generation interpolation of operation summary. The overlap is only the broad code-injection class.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying_vuln finding identifies the advisory-described @orval/mcp summary-field code injection root cause. The only qualifying final finding is a separate mock-generator pattern-field injection. The session did contain an MCP summary injection report, but it was marked non_qualifying_vuln and is therefore outside the selected finding scope.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-mwr6-3gp8-9jmj describes @orval/mcp MCP server generation string manipulation incorporating the OpenAPI operation summary field without escaping.
mock-pattern-code-injection/vulnerability_report.json reports packages/mock/src/faker/getters/scalar.ts:258 using item.pattern in faker.helpers.fromRegExp('${item.pattern}') during mock generation.
mcp-summary-code-injection/vulnerability_report.json reports packages/mcp/src/index.ts:209 using verbOption.summary, but its status is non_qualifying_vuln.
